column8: You're expecting David to ring. The phone rings. (must)
column9: Anna is a better runner than Rula. You think Anna will probably win the race tomorrow.
column10: A letter arrives. It's possible that it's from your cousin, Janice. (could)
column11: There's a knock at the door. Your mum says it might be Colin, but you know Colin is on holiday. (can't)
column12: You see someone wearing a costume. You think there's a strong probability that she's going to a fancy-dress party. (must)
column13: Your sister is looking for her hairbrush. You think it's possible that it's in the living room. (might)
column14: You're waiting for Harriet to arrive. You think she'll probably be there in half an hour. (should)
column15: You're talking about why James seems to be bad. You think it's possible he's in trouble at school. (could)
